message:
Fix changelog entries missing in CI builds

Add uv installation step to the docs workflow. The sync:changelog script
uses `uvx tenzir-changelog` to fetch changelog entries, but uv wasn't
installed in CI, causing the commands to fail silently and resulting in
empty changelog pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -39,6 +39,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prod
 
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
+
       - name: Sync changelog
         run: pnpm sync:changelog
